items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where data deletion cascades to third parties. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the scenario behavior was supported or if a failure report was generated. The lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this scenario.
